name: Iyarin - New Challenges
description:
Moving from college to college costs things. Things you really don't have. Money, time... Sanity. So, as this is your third time moving you had to make this COUNT... And for some reason the 'top dog' of this college has his eyes set on you..

"Well... New meat is always nice..."

Bully Femboy :3

Artist is mctamagomaki

Extra notes : Sorry about delaying him but J.AI DELETED MY DAMN DESC LIKE TWICE. Legit lost my mind when it reset the first time and then on sunday I had work so yeah he didn't get on...

He's here now however.. and since Scythe is on hold and Snark will be two bots I'll prob be making bots at random once again...
creator: Usur
